Package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.control

Class SetMissedMealBolusReminderRequest

java.lang.Object
com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message
com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.control.SetMissedMealBolusReminderRequest
public class SetMissedMealBolusReminderRequest extends Message
Sets a missed meal bolus reminder configuration. Cargo layout (8 bytes, little-endian): [0] reminderIndex uint8 - reminder slot index [1] enabledReminder uint8 - 0=disabled, 1=enabled [2-3] startTime uint16 - start time in minutes since midnight [4-5] endTime uint16 - end time in minutes since midnight [6] selectedDays uint8 - days-of-week bitmask (bit 0=Mon, 1=Tue, 2=Wed, 3=Thu, 4=Fri, 5=Sat, 6=Sun) [7] bitmask uint8 - change bitmask (bits: 0=enabled, 1=startTime, 2=endTime, 3=selectedDays)
Request message for SetMissedMealBolusReminderResponse, opCode -38, size 8
Message properties:
 opCode  -38 
 size  8 
 type  MessageType.REQUEST 
 characteristic  Characteristic.CONTROL 
 response  SetMissedMealBolusReminderResponse 
 signed  true
